title: Cross-repo dispatch + visual parity
mechanism: Enumerate + Read 整鏈 8 環節:(1) release.yml — smoke-shard 4/4 全綠 gate → audit gates(26 道 deterministic + apps/template build)→ pack dry-run dist 驗 → dogfood-prepublish-verify → 5-manifest version sync BLOCKER(2026-07-14 已前移至 publish 之前,fail-closed before irreversible)→ 冪等 publish(npm view guard + concurrency serialize)→ beta 自動 repoint latest → GitHub Release → dispatch `ds-published`(PRODUCT_WORKSPACE_DISPATCH_TOKEN,未設明確 ::warning:: skip 無假 fallback;ref_name 走 env var 防 script-injection);(2) notify-consumers job — CROSS_REPO_TOKEN dispatch `design-system-published` ✓;(3) ssot-sync-dispatch.yml — 非版本 main push 偵測 SSOT paths → dispatch `ds-ssot-changed`,event type 與 receiver 完全對齊 ✓;(4) mirror-to-published-template.yml — workflow_run [Release] success 主路徑(根治 timing race)+ push paths 與 mirror ALLOWLIST 同步(逐項比對含 refresh-fork-launchers / verify-consumer-css-entry)✓;(5) 接收端 sync-design-system.yml — on types [design-system-published, ds-published, ds-ssot-changed] 三 event 全收、concurrency serialize、payload 走 env var、version 剝 v 前綴兼容、--save 寫 spec 防 lockfile-only drift、fork-safe template sync(opt-out marker + @template-customized)、push 前 audit.yml 等價 full gate(GITHUB_TOKEN push 不觸發下游防護的補位)、rebase-retry×5 fail-closed ✓;(6) composition-fidelity.yml — opt-in marker 秒級 pre-step(0 marker → skip 重建),conformance 主防線走靜態 hook(composition-fidelity.md 分層模型,非 gap);(7) dogfood-prepublish-verify.mjs — fresh consumer install + vite build 模擬 ✓;(8) visual-assertions.json — 113 scenario 供 visual-audit 消費 ✓。PAT scope:兩 token 用途分離且未設時皆顯式 warning + Dependabot daily fallback,無沉默斷鏈。
